title: Meet the 19-metre octopus that prowled the ancient seas
description: Giant octopuses may have ruled the oceans 100 million years ago, according to fossil evidence.

title: Ancient fossils reveal when the iconic Twelve Apostles formed - Australian Broadcasting Corporation
description: Ancient fossils reveal when the iconic Twelve Apostles formed Australian Broadcasting Corporation ‘A history of the Earth’: Twelve Apostles revealed to be as old as 14m years The Guardian Australia's Twelve Apostles draw millions. Now, their mysteries have been solved SBS Australia Researchers rewrite Twelve Apostles’ origin story NT News Scientists discover how the Twelve Apostles were formed—and their real age Phys.org

title: Ancient fossils reveal when the iconic Twelve Apostles formed
description: An analysis of tiny fossils of sea creatures found in rock samples around the Port Campbell region in south-western Victoria has refined our understanding of how the Twelve Apostles formed.

title: CA home insurance bill aimed at fossil fuel firms dies just after it was revived
description: The Dixie Fire burns near Highway 70 on July 21, 2021, in the Feather River canyon in Plumas County. The blaze is the largest-single source wildfire in California history.
